dialog: I have the 5 Chips. I must admit I feel a little less confused.
Well done! You have just completed a full Epoch. But I see you are impatient and want to press 'Train' over and over again.
Yes! More epochs, more learning, right? Let's keep going indefinitely!
Hey, hey, slow down! You don't always learn just by rushing. There is a right speed for learning. Go find Lady Rate, she will explain the correct pace.
